notes: Primarily a position paper: proposes five mechanisms, six prompt-architecture coupling patterns, and a three-layer governance framework, grounded in a survey of six agentic coding tools and framework/provider documentation. It includes a small empirical demonstration (three independently-generated chatbot variants built with Claude Code, with LoC/file/component counts recorded in Table I), but the authors explicitly frame this as 'illustration, not experimental proof' (each prompt run once, one tool, one LLM). No human participants.
